title: GOAT
tmdbOverview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.
synopsis: GOAT is a 2026 animation, comedy and family film from United States. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
